agent-native-catalog.note: Hard requirement. Applied to all 35 entries. Zero false positives.

yaml-only-direct-push.note: Best practice for data-only commits. No regressions across 3 pushes.

auto-pipeline-for-curation.note: Cross-domain pattern. 4 successful curation pipeline runs, including Phase 2.

pre-verify-tool-metadata.note: New rule from verify-before-describe anti-pattern. Pending first fire.

batch-catalog-additions.note: New rule from incremental-catalog-runs anti-pattern. Pending first fire.

append-not-insert-yaml.note: New rule from mid-file-yaml-edits anti-pattern. Pending first fire.

jaccard-originality-check.note: Shingle-based Jaccard similarity check for skill originality. 45 skills checked, worst 13.8%, zero false positives.

verify-gate-before-advance.note: Promoted from proposed. Verified across Phase 1 (10 transitions) and Phase 2 (build-test cycle). Prevents skipping quality gates.

catalog-yaml-valid.note: YAML validated every time. Zero syntax errors across 35 entries.

catalog-category-count.note: Category counts verified every run. All hitting targets. 6 gap finds.

test-suite.note: 236 tests pass after Phase 2. Zero regressions. Up from 209 baseline.

pre-verify-metadata.note: New harness check from evolution. Pending first fire.

handoff-templates.note: Verifies all 8 handoff docs exist in docs/handoffs/. Passed both runs (8/8).

phase-gates-doc.note: Verifies gates.md has all 10 phase transitions documented. Passed both runs.

skill-originality.note: Jaccard similarity check on 45 skills. Worst: 13.8%. Zero fails, zero warns.

proposed_rules.name: use-handoff-at-transitions
proposed_rules.reason: Every phase transition must produce a handoff.md using docs/handoffs/ templates. Prevents context loss between layers.

tdd.reason: No production code in curation projects. Rule had zero applicability.

mid-file-yaml-edits.reason: Reclassified as anti-pattern. Replaced by active rule: append-not-insert-yaml.

incremental-catalog-runs.reason: Reclassified as anti-pattern. Replaced by active rule: batch-catalog-additions.

verify-before-describe.reason: Reclassified as anti-pattern. Replaced by active rule: pre-verify-tool-metadata.
